name: Development Standards Defined
description: Software requirements, design, and coding standards are defined before the corresponding life-cycle data is produced.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-1 obj 6-7: requirements, design and code standards are defined so outputs can be checked for conformance. Not required at DAL D.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
